zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Neville於1396年6月出生在英國達勒姆拉比 卡素時，她的父親Ralph Neville32歲，母親Margaret Stafford Countess of Westmoreland32歲。她於1413年與Sir Richard Scrope結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1463年3月4日在英國素福爾可克萊爾享年66歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可克萊爾。

nameMeanings.name: Neville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Neuville in Calvados or Néville in Seine-Maritime, both so called from Old French neu(f) ‘new’ (from Latin novus) + ville ‘settlement’. One family line, originally from Neuville (Calvados), became powerful during the Wars of the Roses through Richard Neville (1428–71), 16th Earl of Warwick, nicknamed "The Kingmaker".
Irish (Munster): assimilation of the Gaelic name Ó Niadh (see Nee ) and sometimes of Ó Cnaimhín (see Nevin ).

History: George Neville came to VA in or c. 1700 and settled on the headwaters of the Occoquan River, acquiring a large estate. His descendants, bearing the surnames Neville and Craig, were of considerable importance in Pittsburgh, PA, and Cincinnati, OH.

meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Nevels
meanings: English and Scottish (Wigtownshire): of Norman origin, a variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.
Dutch and North German: unexplained.

variants.name: Nee
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Dermot, John Patrick.

Irish (Galway): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Niadh ‘descendant of Nia’ or Mac Niadh ‘son of Nia’. Compare McNee . Needham 2 and Neville have also been adopted as Anglicized forms of this name.
North German: possibly a relationship name from Middle Low German neve ‘nephew, grand-child’.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Neville was born in June 1396, in Raby Castle, Durham, England, her father, Ralph Neville, was 32 and her mother, Margaret Stafford Countess of Westmoreland, was 32. She married Sir Richard Scrope in 1413. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died on 4 March 1463, in Clare, Suffolk, England, at the age of 66, and was buried in Clare, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Neville est née en juin 1396, à Raby Castle, Durham, Angleterre, son père, Ralph Neville, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Margaret Stafford Countess of Westmoreland, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Richard Scrope en 1413. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée le 4 mars 1463, à Clare, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterrée à Clare, Suffolk, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Nevilleが1396年6月にイギリスダルハムラビー カストルで生まれた時，父Ralph Nevilleは32歳，母Margaret Stafford Countess of Westmorelandは32歳であった。1413年にSir Richard Scropeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1463年3月4日にイギリススフォルククラーで66歳で死去し，イギリススフォルククラーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Neville(이)가 1396년 6월 영국 뒤람 라비 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ralph Neville(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Stafford Countess of Westmoreland(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1413년 Sir Richard Scrope(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1463년 3월 4일 영국 수폴크 클래르에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 클래르에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Sir Richard Scrope em 1413. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Neville родилась июнь 1396 г. в местности раби кастл, дурам, Англия, её отцу по имени Ralph Neville было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Stafford Countess of Westmoreland, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Richard Scrope в 1413 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла 4 марта 1463 г. в местности клар, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 66 лет и была похоронена в местности клар, суффолк, Англия.
